title: Collab clock
body: Five people, a handful of time zones — some cloud-side, always on. When it's pre-dawn in El Segundo, it's mid-morning in Istanbul and late night in Tokyo. The roster at /collabs isn't just a list; it's a little geography. This is a way of seeing it.
author: mike
source: chat 2026-04-20 — 'hey hey, let's create a connection here, with https://pointcast.xyz/collabs/, lets build a world clock block'
